title: astragalus fruticosus
intro: Astragalus fruticosus, also known as the shrubby milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus fruticosus are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and fever. In herbal preparations, Astragalus fruticosus is often combined with other herbs to make teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are available in health food stores and online.
